## Test Plan

<!-- How to verify this change works -->

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`poetry run pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed code
- [ ] Lint clean (`poetry run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Type clean (`poetry run mypy . --strict`)

- [ ] My changes don't introduce new warnings
